title: Reinforced concrete unit weight
excerpt: Typical reinforced concrete unit weight used for field estimates: approximately 150 pcf.

title: Masonry unit weight
excerpt: Typical masonry unit weight used for field estimates: approximately 125 pcf.

title: Wood unit weight
excerpt: Typical structural wood unit weight for rough field estimates: approximately 35 pcf.

title: Structural steel unit weight
excerpt: Typical structural steel unit weight used for field estimates: approximately 490 pcf.

title: Mechanical advantage efficiency model
excerpt: Actual mechanical advantage can be estimated as theoretical MA multiplied by per-pulley efficiency to the power of pulley count.
